examples.titleZh: 电商主图 - 粉蓝洞洞鞋时尚广告
examples.titleEn: E-commerce Main Image - Pastel Blue Crocs Fashion Ad
examples.author: SPEEDAI07
examples.promptOriginal: A high-end studio advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}, in a monochrome pastel blue and white color palette, with a glossy reflective floor and a soft sky-blue backdrop. The background is dominated by the word {argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"} in gigantic bold white condensed sans-serif letters spanning nearly the full height of the image. In the top-right corner, add small white text reading "Designed with ChatGPT". Feature 3 adult women with shoulder-length wavy light brown to dark blonde hair, all wearing loose oversized white long-sleeve tops and flowing white wide-leg pants, styled as minimalist fashion models with relaxed neutral expressions. Their faces are intentionally obscured or blurred. One model reclines against an enormous upright white clog shoe on the left side, one model sits casually on top of a giant white clog on the upper right, and one model lounges on the floor at the lower right, leaning back on one arm while seated partly on a glossy blue sphere. Include 2 oversized white clog shoes as hero props: one standing vertically on the left showing the sole and side profile, and one angled on blue crystalline blocks at center-right showing the upper and toe box. Both clogs are classic foam slip-on style with perforation holes, chunky tread, heel straps, and circular logo rivets. The center-right clog is decorated with exactly 8 visible charms pinned to the upper: a blue-green iridescent round charm, a white daisy with yellow center, a black-and-white round emblem near the strap, a small "CROCS" word charm, a dark flower, a peace-hand sign, an orange smiley face, a white cloud, and an orange flower. Scatter exactly 7 glossy floating or grounded blue spheres of varying sizes around the set: one large sphere behind the left model, one medium sphere floating near center, one medium sphere at bottom left foreground, one medium sphere used as a seat under the lower-right model, one small sphere near the upper left, and 2 additional blue spheres integrated into the composition. Add translucent sculptural gel-like forms at the far left and far right edges, plus angular blue crystal-like rocks beneath the right shoe. At the bottom center, place white promotional copy in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."} on the first line and {argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."} on the second line. Beneath that, show 4 minimalist feature icons with labels in white: "ICONIC COMFORT", "LIGHTWEIGHT", "EASY TO CLEAN", and "UNIQUELY YOU". Place the {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} logo in bold lowercase white at the bottom center with a small trademark symbol. The overall style should feel like a premium surreal fashion campaign, clean editorial lighting, soft shadows, glossy textures, airy composition, and modern lifestyle product advertising.
examples.promptZh: {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"} 的高端工作室广告海报，采用单色柔和的蓝色和白色调色板，配有光滑的反光地板和柔和的天蓝色背景。背景以“{argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"}”这个词为主，它是巨大的粗体白色压缩无衬线字母，几乎跨越了图像的整个高度。在右上角添加白色小文本“Designed with ChatGPT”。三位成年女性留着及肩的浅棕色至深金色波浪发，均穿着宽松的超大白色长袖上衣和飘逸的白色阔腿裤，造型简约时尚，表情轻松中性。他们的脸被故意遮挡或模糊。一名模特靠在左侧一只巨大的直立白色木底鞋上，一名模特随意地坐在右上角的一只巨大白色木底鞋上，一名模特懒洋洋地躺在右下角的地板上，向后靠在一只手臂上，部分坐在一个光滑的蓝色球体上。包括 2 只超大白色木底鞋作为英雄道具：一只垂直站立在左侧，显示鞋底和侧面轮廓，另一只在右中角的蓝色水晶块上倾斜，显示鞋面和脚趾盒。两款木底鞋均采用经典泡沫一脚蹬款式，配有穿孔、粗胎面、鞋跟带和圆形徽标铆钉。中右木鞋的鞋面饰有 8 个可见饰物：蓝绿色虹彩圆形饰物、黄色中心的白色雏菊、带子附近的黑白圆形标志、小“CROCS”字样饰物、深色花朵、和平之手标志、橙色笑脸、白色云朵和橙色花朵。在布景周围散布 7 个不同大小的光滑浮动或接地蓝色球体：一个大球体位于左侧模型后面，一个中等球体漂浮在中心附近，一个中等球体位于左下方前景，一个中等球体用作右下模型下方的座位，一个小球体靠近左上角，以及 2 个附加的蓝色球体集成到构图中。在最左和最右边缘添加半透明的雕塑凝胶状形状，并在右鞋下方添加有棱角的蓝色水晶状岩石。在底部中心，以干净的无衬线字体放置白色促销文案：{argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."} 位于第一行，{argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."} 位于第二行。在其下方，显示 4 个带有白色标签的简约功能图标：“ICONIC COMFORT”、“LIGHTWEIGHT”、“EASY TO CLEAN”和“UNIQUELY YOU”。将 {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} 徽标以粗体小写白色放置在底部中心，并带有一个小商标符号。整体风格应该感觉像是一场优质的超现实时尚活动、干净的编辑灯光、柔和的阴影、光泽的纹理、通风的构图和现代生活方式的产品广告。

examples.titleZh: 电商主图 - 9格产品TVC分镜
examples.titleEn: E-commerce Main Image - 9-Panel Product TVC Storyboard
examples.author: Magncsans
examples.promptOriginal: Using the provided reference image, transform the single casual product photo into a polished e-commerce TVC storyboard board for a {argument name="video duration" default="15-second"} ad in a {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical format, presented as a 9-panel grid. Keep the same blue-and-white ceramic ashtray as the product base, but restage it across cinematic advertising shots with warm premium lighting, shallow depth of field, and a refined lifestyle desktop environment. Add a dark storyboard layout with Chinese titles and timing for each panel. Include exactly 9 scenes: 1) environment-establishing wide shot with desk, books, window, and the product placed in context; 2) hero product medium shot on the table; 3) extreme close-up of the blue floral craftsmanship pattern; 4) use case showing a hand placing a cigarette into the ashtray with visible smoke; 5) top-down capacity display showing multiple cigarette butts inside; 6) cleaning scene under running water in a sink with a hand holding the product; 7) bottom-detail close-up showing the underside and anti-slip pads; 8) mood/lifestyle scene at night with the product on a desk, smoke rising, and ambient lamp light; 9) brand closing frame with the product as the hero plus Chinese marketing text. Add the overall header text “产品TVC分镜脚本(15秒 / 9:16竖屏 / 9宫格)” and a product subtitle naming it {argument name="product name" default="青花瓷烟灰缸"}. Give each of the 9 panels a Chinese scene title and timestamp, plus small descriptive Chinese copy beneath each image in the style of a professional commercial shot list. Use premium, realistic commercial photography throughout, consistent product identity, elegant Chinese aesthetic, and a clean high-end storyboard presentation.
promptsOriginal: Using the provided reference image, transform the single casual product photo into a polished e-commerce TVC storyboard board for a {argument name="video duration" default="15-second"} ad in a {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical format, presented as a 9-panel grid. Keep the same blue-and-white ceramic ashtray as the product base, but restage it across cinematic advertising shots with warm premium lighting, shallow depth of field, and a refined lifestyle desktop environment. Add a dark storyboard layout with Chinese titles and timing for each panel. Include exactly 9 scenes: 1) environment-establishing wide shot with desk, books, window, and the product placed in context; 2) hero product medium shot on the table; 3) extreme close-up of the blue floral craftsmanship pattern; 4) use case showing a hand placing a cigarette into the ashtray with visible smoke; 5) top-down capacity display showing multiple cigarette butts inside; 6) cleaning scene under running water in a sink with a hand holding the product; 7) bottom-detail close-up showing the underside and anti-slip pads; 8) mood/lifestyle scene at night with the product on a desk, smoke rising, and ambient lamp light; 9) brand closing frame with the product as the hero plus Chinese marketing text. Add the overall header text “产品TVC分镜脚本(15秒 / 9:16竖屏 / 9宫格)” and a product subtitle naming it {argument name="product name" default="青花瓷烟灰缸"}. Give each of the 9 panels a Chinese scene title and timestamp, plus small descriptive Chinese copy beneath each image in the style of a professional commercial shot list. Use premium, realistic commercial photography throughout, consistent product identity, elegant Chinese aesthetic, and a clean high-end storyboard presentation.

examples.titleEn: Artist and Ethereal Muse at Night
examples.author: almimeister
examples.promptOriginal: A cinematic anime-inspired digital illustration set at night inside a cozy artist's room with large window panes and a warm city glow outside. On the left, a young male artist with {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} messy hair sits at a cluttered desk in side profile, leaning forward with one hand near his mouth and the other drawing with a pen on a tablet or sketchbook. The desk is covered with exactly 1 pen cup filled with pencils, 1 coffee mug, 1 open laptop or pen-display showing a sunset landscape, 1 spiral sketchbook with manga-style character drawings, 2 additional drawing books or pads, 1 small stack of about 4 books, and many scattered art cards and printed illustrations. On the right, a luminous ethereal anime girl made of blue-white light appears life-sized, facing the artist with both hands gently extended toward him. Her form is translucent, delicate, and composed of glowing contour lines, starry particles, and flowing strands of light, with long windblown hair and a soft dress-like silhouette. Between them, a magical stream of golden and white light spirals upward from the artist's desk into the air, connecting creator and creation. Inside this swirling ribbon are exactly 12 to 16 floating image fragments and sketch pages: monochrome character sketches, scenic sunset paintings, small photo-like panels, and tiny icon-like cards, all orbiting in a curved arc from lower center to upper left and upper center. Around the upper half of the image, dozens of glowing musical notes float through the air, mixed with sparkling particles, creating the feeling that inspiration has become visible sound and memory. The palette is rich warm gold and amber on the artist's side, contrasted with cool electric blue and white on the spirit girl's side, with dramatic rim light, volumetric glow, intricate particles, and a dreamy emotional atmosphere. Composition is vertical, highly detailed, intimate, and poetic, evoking the relationship between {argument name="person one" default="you"} and {argument name="person two" default="me"} as artist and imagined muse, where drawings, music, memories, and fantasy physically manifest in the room. Add a small handwritten note card on the desk with {argument name="note text" default="二人だけの物語"}, and display one prominent artwork on the desk and one floating scenic panel using {argument name="scene theme" default="sunset sky over a distant city"}.

examples.titleZh: 美好沐浴日编辑风海报
examples.author: Kazuch75240438
examples.promptOriginal: Create a soft editorial lifestyle poster for {argument name="event date" default="4.26"} celebrating Japanese bath culture, designed like a refined magazine feature page in portrait orientation. The layout is split into two main columns with a pale cream and warm gray background, thin divider lines, elegant serif typography, and muted sage-green accents. At the top left, include the small heading “LIFESTYLE / FEATURE”, then a large date line reading “{argument name="event date" default="4.26"} EVENT”, followed by the large Japanese title “よい風呂の日” and the subtitle “特集” in sage green, with a small bathtub icon nearby. Beneath that, add the Japanese tagline “心も体も、ととのう時間。” and several short body-text blocks in Japanese explaining the meaning of Good Bath Day, including references to “4(よ)2(ふ)6(ろ)” and the benefits of bathing for body and mind. On the right side, show a bright, airy bathroom interior lit by soft natural morning light from a window, with beige and off-white tones, a wooden counter, folded white towels, a pump bottle, a sponge, woven baskets, and a few green plants. In front of the bathroom scene, place a youthful anime-style person with {argument name="hair color" default="soft medium brown"} tousled short hair, fair skin, and a relaxed expression, standing in a casual post-bath pose. The character wears a loose white T-shirt with a tiny dark square chest logo and light brown drawstring lounge pants, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a white towel up near the face and shoulder, conveying a fresh, just-bathed feeling. Near the character, include the handwritten-style Japanese side note “湯上がりの、リラックスタイム。” Add an oval badge on the lower right of the main image area with the English heading “GOOD BATH DAY” and Japanese explanatory text inside, plus a small bathtub icon. Below the main feature, include exactly 2 small inset images of the same character in the bathroom, each framed as rectangular mini-panels with narrow vertical Japanese captions beside them. At the bottom, create exactly 4 rounded rectangular information cards in a row: card 1 labeled “POINT 01” with the heading “お風呂の基本” and text about soaking in lukewarm water around 38–40°C; card 2 labeled “POINT 02” with the heading “日常でできること” and text about making bathing part of a routine instead of only showering; card 3 labeled “POINT 03” with the heading “楽しみ方・取り入れ方” and text about bath salts, scents, music, and lighting; card 4 labeled “まとめ” with concluding Japanese text about sustainable self-care. Decorate the cards with small illustrated elements such as leaves, a bathtub, a candle, a bottle, lavender sprigs, and a basket of folded towels. Along the very bottom, add a horizontal green tip strip labeled “今日からできる TIP” with exactly 3 checklist items: “就寝の1〜2時間前に入浴する”, “スマホは浴室に持ち込まない”, and “水分補給を忘れずに”. Place a final handwritten-style Japanese phrase at the lower right reading “自分をいたわる時間を。” The overall look should be clean, gentle, wellness-focused, feminine-neutral, and polished like a Japanese seasonal magazine infographic, with delicate anime illustration, soft shadows, subtle textures, and calm spa-like atmosphere.

examples.titleZh: 梦幻涩谷泡泡少女
examples.author: terunari
examples.promptOriginal: A dreamy anime-style full-body illustration of a fashionable young woman standing in the middle of the Shibuya scramble crossing in Tokyo on a bright clear day, with the iconic cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building centered in the background and recognizable commercial billboards surrounding it, including signs resembling H&M, DHC, DMM TV, Big Echo, and other dense Japanese city advertisements. She is the single main subject, posed gracefully as if floating or weightless, standing on top of one giant iridescent translucent soap bubble beneath her skirt. Her face is softly obscured and de-emphasized, while her long dark violet-black hair flows dramatically in the wind, with soft bangs and a pink floral headband accessory with ribbon on one side. She wears a sweet feminine spring outfit in pastel pink: a long-sleeved frilled blouse under a sleeveless pink dress with a ribbon tie at the chest, a tan belt at the waist, layered ruffles at the hem, and subtle sakura flower embroidery near the lower skirt. Her expression and body language should feel gentle, elegant, whimsical, and slightly magical. One hand is raised with her index finger pointing upward toward a floating bubble that contains 1 smartphone; her other hand holds a loop handle attached to a large transparent iridescent shopping-bag-like bubble containing 3 visible items: 1 SHIBUYA 109 paper shopping bag, 1 pink shopping bag or package, and 1 small pink bunny-faced pouch. Also include 1 separate floating smartphone/tablet-like device outside the bubbles near the lower left side, and 1 floating bubble on the lower right containing 1 compact camera. Surround her with many soap bubbles of different sizes, all highly reflective with rainbow highlights and delicate transparency, creating a soft sparkling atmosphere. The city scene should be busy but slightly softened, with pedestrians in the far background, crosswalk stripes in the foreground, and warm sunlight filtering through the urban canyon. Use polished high-detail anime illustration rendering, luminous pastel colors, glossy reflections, soft bloom, a romantic spring palette, and a magical everyday Tokyo aesthetic.
examples.promptZh: 一幅梦幻动漫风格的全身插画，描绘了一位时尚年轻女子在晴朗的日子里站在东京涩谷十字路口的中央，背景是标志性的圆柱形涩谷 109 大楼，周围是可识别的商业广告牌，包括类似 H&M、DHC、DMM TV、Big Echo 的标志和其他密集的日本城市广告。她是唯一的主要拍摄对象，她站在裙子下一个巨大的虹彩半透明肥皂泡上，摆出优雅的姿势，仿佛漂浮或失重。她的脸被柔和地遮盖和淡化，而她的深紫黑色长发在风中戏剧性地飘扬，柔软的刘海和一侧带有丝带的粉红色花卉头带配饰。她穿着甜美女性化的淡粉色春季服装：长袖褶边衬衫搭配无袖粉色连衣裙，胸前系丝带，腰部系棕褐色腰带，下摆有分层荷叶边，下裙附近有精致的樱花刺绣。她的表情和肢体语言应该给人温柔、优雅、异想天开、略带神奇的感觉。举起一只手，食指向上指向包含 1 部智能手机的漂浮气泡；她的另一只手握着一个环形手柄，该手柄连接到一个大的透明彩虹色购物袋状气泡，其中包含 3 个可见物品：1 个 SHIBUYA 109 纸质购物袋、1 个粉色购物袋或包装以及 1 个粉色小兔脸袋。还包括 1 个独立的浮动智能手机/平板电脑类设备，靠近左下侧的气泡外，以及右下角的 1 个浮动气泡，其中包含 1 个紧凑型相机。她的周围布满了许多大小不一的肥皂泡，所有肥皂泡都具有彩虹般的高光和细腻的透明度，高度反光，营造出柔和闪闪发光的氛围。城市场景应该是繁忙但稍微柔和的，远处是行人，前景是人行横道条纹，温暖的阳光透过城市峡谷。使用精美的高细节动漫插图渲染、明亮的柔和色彩、光泽反射、柔和的花朵、浪漫的春天调色板和神奇的日常东京美学。

examples.titleZh: 暴风雨热带城市与屋顶飞机
examples.titleEn: Stormy Tropical City With Rooftop Plane
examples.author: Gerry
examples.promptOriginal: A cinematic wide aerial view of a tropical coastal city at sunset during a violent storm, split dramatically between dark storm clouds on the left and blazing golden sunlight on the right. In the foreground, a small single-engine light airplane with a high wing and visible tail is parked or perched precariously on a flat rooftop, seen from behind and slightly above, centered near the bottom of the frame. To the left midair, 1 helicopter flies low over the city with its searchlight cast downward. In the sky, include 1 faint lightning bolt on the far left. The city below is dense with wet streets, reflective pavement, low-rise commercial buildings, and a few taller modern towers, including 1 prominent striped high-rise near the center. A glowing red circular neon sign is visible near the middle distance. On the right side, a calm bay or inlet curves through the city, lined with 1 row of tall palm trees along the waterfront road, and crossed by 1 long low bridge in the distance. The water and streets glisten from recent rain, reflecting the orange sunlight breaking through the clouds. Mood is tense, dramatic, and slightly surreal, like a movie still from an urban disaster thriller. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, high dynamic range lighting, volumetric sun rays, storm atmosphere, wet surfaces, rich contrast, deep shadows, golden highlights, wide-angle lens, epic composition.
examples.promptZh: 猛烈风暴期间热带沿海城市日落时的电影宽幅鸟瞰图，在左侧的黑色风暴云和右侧的金色阳光之间戏剧性地分裂。在前景中，一架带有高机翼和可见尾翼的小型单引擎轻型飞机停放在或摇摇欲坠地停放在平坦的屋顶上，从后面和稍上方看，位于画面底部附近的中心。左侧半空中，一架直升机低空飞过城市上空，探照灯向下投射。在天空中，最左侧有 1 个微弱的闪电。下面的城市充满了潮湿的街道、反光的人行道、低层商业建筑和一些较高的现代塔楼，其中包括靠近中心的一栋突出的条纹高层建筑。在中距离附近可以看到一个发光的红色圆形霓虹灯标志。在右侧，一个平静的海湾或水湾蜿蜒穿过城市，沿着海滨道路两旁排列着一排高大的棕榈树，远处有一座长长的低桥穿过。水和街道因最近的雨而闪闪发光，反射着透过云层的橙色阳光。气氛紧张、戏剧化，还有些超现实，就像城市灾难惊悚片的剧照。逼真、超详细、高动态范围照明、体积太阳光线、风暴气氛、潮湿表面、丰富对比度、深阴影、金色高光、广角镜头、史诗般的构图。

examples.titleZh: 日式中华料理外卖传单
examples.author: xc5_
examples.promptOriginal:
A Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyer for mailbox posting (3:4 aspect ratio). Designed to look like a double-sided B5 print.

Flyer characteristics (following the grammar of real delivery flyers):
- Flashy red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! {argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl in a red cheongsam with a brown short bob"} holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" in a speech bubble.
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: different types of ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, shrimp in chili sauce, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Names and prices for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery on all menu items over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ 072-XX-XXXX" emphasized with a red circle.
- Business hours "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line for clipping): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Texture of cheap paper printing. Includes fold marks. Precision that could be mistaken for a real Japanese delivery flyer.
examples.promptZh:
日本社区的中餐馆送货传单，用于邮箱投递（3:4 宽高比）。设计看起来像双面 B5 印刷品。

传单特征（遵循真实投递传单的语法）：
- 华丽的红色和黄色配色方案。
- 顶部大文本：“可送货！{argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}”（阴影哥特式字体）。
- {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl in a red cheongsam with a brown short bob"} 拿着拉面并说“欢迎！”的插图在一个讲话泡泡中。
- 菜单照片网格（4x3）包含各种菜肴：不同类型的拉面、炒饭、饺子、糖醋肉、辣椒酱虾、麻婆豆腐、肝韭菜、天心饭、回锅肉、春卷、安宁豆腐和炒饭套餐。
- 每道菜的名称和价格。- 黄色大横幅上写着“所有菜单项超过 1,000 日元免费送货！”。
- “通过电话订购！☎ 072-XX-XXXX”用红色圆圈强调。
- 营业时间“11:00-22:00（周二休息）”。
- 送货区域地图（简单示意图）。
- 优惠券（用于剪裁的穿孔线）：“附有此传单的一盘免费饺子！”。

廉价纸张印刷的纹理。包括折叠标记。精度可能会被误认为是真正的日本送货传单。

examples.titleZh: Collectible Figure Workspace Photo
examples.author: Shinning1010
examples.promptOriginal:
Photorealistic high-quality studio photo of a modern digital art workspace, showing the concept of “from 3D virtual character to real collectible figure.”

In the foreground, a highly realistic collectible figurine of [Character Name / Character Identity] is placed on a round wooden display stand. The character has [facial features / appearance], [hairstyle], and a [expression / personality vibe]. The figure is wearing [outfit / costume]. The overall design is refined, premium, and instantly recognizable. The figurine should have realistic collectible statue quality, with subtle resin/sculpture material feel, while still looking highly believable and visually realistic.

The pose is [character pose], natural, stable, elegant, and display-worthy. Shot from a low-angle close-up perspective with slight wide-angle distortion, vertical composition, emphasizing the full figure, clothing structure, leg lines, and pose.

In the background, there is a professional 3D character design workstation with two large curved monitors. Both monitors must show the exact same character as the foreground figurine — same face, same hairstyle, same outfit, same pose, and same overall vibe — clearly expressing the idea of turning a digital 3D character into a real physical figure.

The left monitor shows a gray sculpt / clay model view in a professional 3D sculpting software interface, similar to ZBrush. The gray model must match the foreground figure exactly in character design, pose, outfit structure, and facial identity.

The right monitor shows the fully rendered colored version of the same character, also matching the foreground figure exactly in face, hairstyle, outfit, pose, and temperament. Together, the two monitors reinforce the workflow of “digital character design → physical collectible statue.”

On the desk are a keyboard, mouse, monitor arms, drawing tablet, stylus, and other 3D modeling tools. The workspace is clean, professional, and visually premium. Optional extra elements: [weapon / accessories / theme props / IP-style design details].

Lighting is a mix of soft studio lighting and indoor workspace lighting. The foreground figurine is evenly lit with clear facial and material detail, while the monitors emit cool-toned tech light. Overall mood is realistic, clean, premium, slightly shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, emphasizing the collectible figure quality, professional 3D design studio atmosphere, and the visual concept of “from digital model to real figure.”

photorealistic, ultra detailed, cinematic studio lighting, realistic figurine, collectible statue, 3D character design studio, from digital model to real figure, vertical composition
examples.promptZh:
现代数字艺术工作空间的逼真高品质工作室照片，展示了“从 3D 虚拟角色到真实收藏人物”的概念。

前景中，一个高度逼真的收藏雕像[角色名称/角色身份]被放置在圆形木制展示架上。角色具有[面部特征/外貌]、[发型]和[表情/性格氛围]。该人物穿着[服装/服装]。整体设计精致、优质且易于识别。雕像应具有逼真的收藏雕像品质，具有微妙的树脂/雕塑材料感觉，同时仍然看起来高度可信和视觉逼真。姿势是【人物姿势】，自然、稳定、优雅，值得展示。以低角度特写视角拍摄，广角略有畸变，垂直构图，强调饱满的身材、服装结构、腿部线条和姿势。

后台有一个专业的 3D 角色设计工作站，配有两台大型曲面显示器。两台显示器必须显示与前景雕像完全相同的角色——相同的脸、相同的发型、相同的服装、相同的姿势和相同的整体氛围——清楚地表达了将数字 3D 角色转变为真实的物理人物的想法。

左侧显示器在专业3D雕刻软件界面中显示灰色雕刻/粘土模型视图，类似于ZBrush。灰色模型必须在人物设计、姿势、服装结构、面部特征等方面与前景人物完全匹配。右侧显示器显示同一角色的完全渲染彩色版本，并且在脸部、发型、服装、姿势和气质方面也与前景人物完全匹配。这两台显示器共同强化了“数字角色设计 → 实体收藏雕像”的工作流程。

桌子上有键盘、鼠标、显示器支架、绘图板、手写笔和其他 3D 建模工具。工作空间干净、专业、视觉效果极佳。可选额外元素：【武器/配件/主题道具/IP风格的设计细节】。照明是柔和的工作室照明和室内工作空间照明的混合。前景雕像的光线均匀，面部和材质细节清晰，而显示器则发出冷色调的科技光。整体基调写实、干净、高级，景深略浅，细节超丰富，强调收藏级的手办品质、专业的3D设计工作室氛围以及“从数字模型到真人手办”的视觉概念。

逼真、超详细、电影工作室灯光、逼真雕像、收藏雕像、3D 角色设计工作室、从数字模型到真实人物、垂直构图

examples.author: SPEEDAI07
examples.promptOriginal:
A dynamic 2×2 grid collage of modern outdoor sportswear advertising posters, each panel representing a different adventure lifestyle brand. High-energy, editorial-style composition with bold typography and textured graphic design.

Top-left panel:
Athletic male model in a bright blue insulated winter jacket, black snow pants, gloves, and sunglasses, stepping forward in a snowy environment. Snow particles flying, dramatic motion. Background features rough blue paint brush strokes. Bold distressed typography reads: “NEVER STOP EXPLORING.” Additional small text: “Built for extremes.” High contrast, rugged winter exploration theme.

Top-right panel:
Fit male hiker climbing rocky terrain, wearing an olive green shirt, black trekking pants, and a large black backpack with orange straps. Dust and debris kicking up from the ground. Background includes orange paint strokes and sketched mountain graphics. Bold text: “BUILT FOR HERE – INDIA TESTED.” Handwritten Hindi accents and arrows. Warm earthy tones.

Bottom-left panel:
Calm outdoor scene with a male model sitting on a rock, wearing a green jacket, beanie, sunglasses, and hiking shoes. Minimal scenic mountain illustration in the background with soft green tones. Typography reads: “ESCAPE THE NOISE – JUST GO OUTSIDE.” Clean, relaxed, nature-focused aesthetic with subtle graphic elements.

Bottom-right panel:
Energetic female runner in motion wearing a purple athletic t-shirt, black shorts, and running shoes. Bright, playful background with purple and yellow paint splashes, doodles, arrows, and sun illustration. Bold typography: “READY FOR EVERYONE – START YOUR JOURNEY.” Youthful, vibrant fitness energy.

Overall style:

High-resolution, photorealistic sportswear campaign

Bold brushstroke textures and grunge overlays

Mixed typography: distressed, handwritten, and modern sans-serif

Strong color blocking per panel (blue, orange, green, purple)

Dynamic poses conveying motion, strength, and adventure

Clean grid layout with balanced spacing

Commercial advertising / brand campaign aesthetic (Nike, Decathlon style)

Lighting: Professional, cinematic lighting with sharp detail and contrast
Mood: Energetic, adventurous, motivational
Aspect ratio: 1:1 (square collage)
examples.promptZh:
现代户外运动服装广告海报的动态 2×2 网格拼贴画，每个面板代表不同的冒险生活方式品牌。高能量的编辑风格构图，大胆的排版和纹理图形设计。

左上面板：
身穿亮蓝色保暖冬季夹克、黑色雪裤、手套和墨镜的运动男模特在雪地环境中向前迈进。雪粒飞舞，运动剧烈。背景具有粗糙的蓝色画笔描边。大胆的仿旧字体写着：“永不停止探索。”附加小文字：“专为极端而打造。”高对比度、崎岖的冬季探索主题。右上角面板：
适合男性徒步旅行者攀爬岩石地形，穿着橄榄绿衬衫、黑色徒步裤和带有橙色肩带的黑色大背包。灰尘和碎片从地面升起。背景包括橙色笔画和草绘山图形。粗体文字：“专为此处打造 - 经过印度测试。”手写的印地语口音和箭头。温暖的大地色调。

左下面板：
平静的户外场景，一位男模特坐在岩石上，穿着绿色夹克、无檐小便帽、太阳镜和登山鞋。背景中的最小风景山插图，带有柔和的绿色色调。字体上写着：“逃避噪音——出去吧。”干净、轻松、注重自然的美学与微妙的图形元素。右下面板：
精力充沛的女跑步者在运动中穿着紫色运动 T 恤、黑色短裤和跑鞋。明亮、俏皮的背景，带有紫色和黄色油漆飞溅、涂鸦、箭头和太阳插图。大胆的字体：“为所有人做好准备——开始你的旅程。”青春活力，充满活力的健身能量。

整体风格：

高分辨率、逼真的运动服广告活动

大胆的笔触纹理和垃圾覆盖

混合字体：仿旧、手写和现代无衬线字体

每个面板都有很强的色块（蓝色、橙色、绿色、紫色）

动态姿势传达运动、力量和冒险

干净的网格布局，间距平衡

商业广告/品牌活动美学（耐克、迪卡侬风格）

灯光：专业的电影灯光，具有清晰的细节和对比度
情绪： 精力充沛、富有冒险精神、激励人心
长宽比：1:1（方形拼贴）

examples.author: madpencil_
examples.promptOriginal:
Ultra-realistic satellite view from space, a clean modern editorial layout of 9 vertical panels arranged side-by-side on a white background, together forming the word "MADPENCIL", each panel containing one letter created entirely from natural Earth topography, no artificial text overlays:

Panel 1 (M): rugged mountain ranges and deep valleys forming a sharp, angular "M", rocky textures, high elevation shadows
Panel 2 (A): winding river cutting through dense green forest forming an organic "A", strong contrast between water and vegetation
Panel 3 (D): desert dunes and wind-sculpted sand patterns shaping a smooth "D", warm tones, soft gradients
Panel 4 (P): agricultural farmland grids and patchwork fields forming a structured "P", geometric patterns clearly visible
Panel 5 (E): glacier and ice formations carving a crisp "E", bright whites and icy blues, fractured textures
Panel 6 (N): braided river system across floodplains forming "N", branching channels with natural flow lines
Panel 7 (C): coastal shoreline and ocean edge shaping a curved "C", waves and sediment gradients visible
Panel 8 (I): narrow canyon or straight river cutting through terrain forming a minimal "I", strong vertical emphasis
Panel 9 (L): volcanic terrain with lava flows forming an "L", dark rock with glowing red/orange lava accents

examples.promptZh:
从太空看的超现实卫星视图，干净的现代编辑布局，由 9 个垂直面板并排排列在白色背景上，共同形成单词“MADPENCIL”，每个面板包含一个完全根据自然地球地形创建的字母，没有人工文本叠加：

第 1 组（M）：崎岖的山脉和深谷，形成尖锐、棱角分明的“M”，岩石纹理、高海拔阴影
图2（A）：蜿蜒的河流穿过茂密的绿色森林，形成有机的“A”，水与植被形成强烈对比
面板3（D）：沙漠沙丘和风雕沙纹塑造出光滑的“D”形，温暖的色调，柔和的渐变
图4（P）：农业耕地网格和田地错落有致，形成结构化的“P”，几何图案清晰可见
第 5 幅 (E)：冰川和冰层雕刻出清晰的“E”，明亮的白色和冰冷的蓝色，断裂的纹理图 6 (N)：横跨洪泛区的辫状河系统，形成“N”形，具有自然流线的分支河道
图 7 (C)：沿海海岸线和海洋边缘形成弯曲的“C”形，波浪和沉积物梯度可见
第8组（I）：狭窄的峡谷或笔直的河流穿过地形，形成最小的“I”，强烈的垂直强调
第 9 幅（L）：火山地形，熔岩流形成“L”形，深色岩石带有发光的红色/橙色熔岩口音自上而下的卫星视角，NASA地球观测风格，超详细的纹理，真实的地理，所有面板上一致的比例和照明，最少的云，高对比度，锐利的焦点，微妙的大气雾霾，自然的色彩分级，超高分辨率8K，面板之间干净的间距，现代画廊风格的构图，视觉上有凝聚力，但每个面板明显不同的生物群系，字母清晰可读但有机地融入地形

Ultra-realistic satellite view from space, a clean modern editorial layout of 9 vertical panels arranged side-by-side on a white background, together forming the word "MADPENCIL", each panel containing one letter created entirely from natural Earth topography, no artificial text overlays:

Panel 1 (M): rugged mountain ranges and deep valleys forming a sharp, angular "M", rocky textures, high elevation shadows
Panel 2 (A): winding river cutting through dense green forest forming an organic "A", strong contrast between water and vegetation
Panel 3 (D): desert dunes and wind-sculpted sand patterns shaping a smooth "D", warm tones, soft gradients
Panel 4 (P): agricultural farmland grids and patchwork fields forming a structured "P", geometric patterns clearly visible
Panel 5 (E): glacier and ice formations carving a crisp "E", bright whites and icy blues, fractured textures
Panel 6 (N): braided river system across floodplains forming "N", branching channels with natural flow lines
Panel 7 (C): coastal shoreline and ocean edge shaping a curved "C", waves and sediment gradients visible
Panel 8 (I): narrow canyon or straight river cutting through terrain forming a minimal "I", strong vertical emphasis
Panel 9 (L): volcanic terrain with lava flows forming an "L", dark rock with glowing red/orange lava accents

examples.author: Strength04_X
examples.promptOriginal:
A high-end café-style product photograph of a transparent glass filled with iced coffee, centered against a soft beige and cream seamless studio background. The drink shows a rich dark coffee base blending with creamy milk swirls, creating a smooth gradient effect. Several clear ice cubes are visible with realistic transparency and light refraction. The glass has subtle condensation droplets, adding freshness. Soft natural studio lighting creates delicate highlights and a clean shadow beneath the glass. Ultra-sharp focus, premium beverage advertisement style, DSLR macro photography, hyper realistic, 8K.

PROMPT 2 - Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of an iced coffee.

Top → Bottom structure:
Foam Layer (light creamy foam with soft airy texture)
→ Coffee Liquid (rich dark espresso layer with smooth gradient)
→ Ice Cubes (transparent cubes with sharp edges and reflections)
→ Milk Layer (soft creamy white layer with smooth blend effect)
→ Glass Base (clear minimal glass structure)

All elements must be perfectly centered, evenly spaced, and aligned vertically. Use a soft beige seamless background with clean café-style lighting and subtle realistic shadows beneath each floating element. The composition should feel like a premium beverage ad combined with a clean infographic layout.

Add clean minimalist text labels with thin pointer lines using these exact labels:
“Foam”
“Coffee”
“Ice”
“Milk”
“Glass”
Ultra-realistic liquid detail, sharp reflections, premium commercial photography, 8K.
examples.promptZh:
高端咖啡馆风格的产品照片，展示的是装满冰咖啡的透明玻璃杯，以柔和的米色和奶油色无缝工作室背景为中心。该饮料展现出浓郁的黑咖啡底与奶油牛奶漩涡的混合，创造出平滑的渐变效果。可以看到几个透明的冰块，具有逼真的透明度和光折射。玻璃上有微妙的凝结水滴，增添了新鲜感。柔和的自然工作室灯光在玻璃下创造出精致的高光和干净的阴影。超锐焦，优质饮料广告风格，单反微距摄影，超写实，8K。

提示 2 - 创建冰咖啡的超现实分解垂直信息图表组合。顶部→底部结构：
泡沫层（轻盈的奶油状泡沫，质地柔软透气）
→ 咖啡液（浓郁的深色浓缩咖啡层，渐变平滑）
→ 冰块（具有锋利边缘和反射的透明立方体）
→ 牛奶层（柔软的乳白色层，具有光滑的混合效果）
→ 玻璃底座（透明最小玻璃结构）

所有元素必须完全居中、均匀分布且垂直对齐。使用柔和的米色无缝背景，在每个浮动元素下方配有干净的咖啡馆风格照明和微妙的逼真阴影。该构图应该感觉像是优质饮料广告与干净的信息图表布局的结合。

使用这些精确的标签添加带有细指针线的干净简约文本标签：
“泡沫”
“咖啡”
“冰”
“牛奶”
“玻璃”
超逼真的液体细节、锐利的反射、优质商业摄影、8K。

examples.author: cellinlab
sha_zdiii
examples.promptOriginal:
Ultra-realistic high-fashion magazine cover, black and white cinematic portrait of a confident young female model, slightly messy wet-look hair, sharp jawline, intense gaze, natural glossy lips, wearing a premium black leather trench coat over a minimal outfit.
The model is posing slightly tilted forward with attitude, hands adjusting the coat, accessorized with multiple rings, ear piercings, and layered chain necklaces.
Lighting is dramatic studio lighting with soft shadows, high contrast, editorial Vogue-style aesthetic, ultra-detailed skin texture, 8K resolution, sharp focus.
Background is minimal gradient grey with soft light streaks for depth.
Magazine cover layout included:
Large bold serif title at top: “VOID ELITE”
Subtitle small: “Edition 07 / 2026”
Left text: “NOT BUILT TO FOLLOW — BUILT TO DOMINATE”
Bottom left: “HIGH-FASHION STREET LUXURY”
Right vertical text: “UNTOUCHABLE PRESENCE”
Bottom right: “SILENCE IS POWER”
Add a small holographic glitch-style label over the eyes with text “ICON”
Style: luxury fashion editorial, Vogue, Harper’s Bazaar, monochrome aesthetic, modern typography, clean layout, ultra premium branding
--ar 2:3 --style raw --quality 2 --sharp focus --photorealistic
examples.promptZh:
超写实的高级时尚杂志封面，自信的年轻女模特的黑白电影肖像，略显凌乱的湿发，锐利的下巴轮廓，强烈的目光，自然光泽的嘴唇，在简约的服装外穿高级黑色皮革风衣。
模特的姿势略微前倾，双手调整着外套，配饰有多个戒​​指、耳洞和分层项链。
灯光是戏剧性的工作室灯光，具有柔和的阴影、高对比度、编辑版《Vogue》风格的美感、超细致的皮肤纹理、8K 分辨率、锐利的焦点。
背景是最小的渐变灰色，带有柔和的光线条纹以增强深度。
杂志封面布局包括：
顶部大号粗体衬线标题：“VOID ELITE”
小字幕：“第 07 版 / 2026”
左文字：“不是为了追随而建立的——而是为了统治而建立的”
左下：“高级时尚街头奢华”右竖排文字：“不可触碰的存在”
右下：“沉默就是力量”
在眼睛上添加一个小的全息故障风格标签，并带有文字“ICON”
风格：奢华时尚社论、《Vogue》、《Harper’s Bazaar》、单色美学、现代排版、简洁布局、超优质品牌
--ar 2:3 --风格原始 --质量 2 --锐焦点 --真实感

examples.titleZh: 游戏层素材 - 角色拆分图集优化版
examples.titleEn: Game Assets - Optimized Character Parts Sprite Sheet
examples.author: 游戏元素拆分 gpt-image2
examples.imageDir: docs/游戏/游戏元素拆分 gpt-image2
examples.promptOriginal: 游戏角色素材，2D像素风格，中国武侠元素，男性侠客 【整体要求】- 角色为中国古风侠客，干练、英气- 像素风格（pixel art），清晰轮廓，统一光源- 输出为标准 sprite sheet（角色拆分图集）- 所有部件彼此独立，可用于骨骼动画（rigging / skeletal animation）- 每个部件之间无粘连，留有透明间距- 统一透视（正视或微侧视） 【身体部位拆分（独立图块）】- 前发（bangs）- 后发（back hair）- 头部（head base，不含五官）- 脖子（neck）- 颈饰（neck accessory）- 上装（upper clothing）- 手部（hands，多姿势）- 下装（lower clothing）- 腿部穿着（legwear）- 鞋子（shoes）- 尾巴（optional）- 翅膀（optional）- 物品（武器/配饰，如剑、挂饰等） 【头部细分（五官全部独立）】- 头饰（hair accessory）- 脸部轮廓（face base）- 虹膜（irises，多颜色变化）- 眉毛（eyebrows，多表情）- 眼白（sclera）- 睫毛（eyelashes）- 眼镜（glasses，可选）- 耳朵（ears）- 耳饰（earrings）- 鼻子（nose）- 嘴巴（mouth，多表情） 【排版要求】- 所有部件整齐排列在图集中，分区清晰- 类似游戏角色编辑器素材布局- 深色背景或透明背景- 每类部件集中摆放，间距均匀 【风格细节】- 中国武侠服饰（布衣、绑带、披风、腰带等）- 配色克制（深蓝、灰、红点缀）- 可加入轻微动态元素（披风、发丝）

examples.titleZh: A lone hooded warrior faces a four-headed serpent behemoth on a jagged peak and
examples.titleEn: A lone hooded warrior faces a four-headed serpent behemoth on a jagged peak and
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
The following storyboard sheet strictly preserves the user's specified visual style.

[PROJECT OVERVIEW]
- **Duration:** 15 seconds
- **Style Lock:** Dark cinematic epic fantasy, high-contrast silhouettes, sepia and golden-amber lighting, misty atmosphere, realistic textures.
- **Core Story:** A lone hooded warrior faces a four-headed serpent behemoth on a jagged peak and prepares for a final, explosive stand.
- **Narrative Flow:** Setup (Encirclement) / Development (The Roar) / Turn (The Draw) / Payoff (The Strike) / Ending (Explosion of Light)
- **Number of Cuts:** 7
- **Layout Logic:** Top-to-bottom storyboard sheet

[VERTICAL STORYBOARD SHEET]

**CUT 01**
- **Time:** 00:00-00:02
- **Start Frame:** Wide shot of the warrior standing on the jagged rock, surrounded by four dormant, towering serpent heads in silhouette.
- **End Frame:** The camera slowly dollies in; the heads begin to shift slightly in the golden mist.
- **Camera Work:** Establishing Wide Shot, slow push-in, low angle looking up at the rock.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The scene is still and tense. The golden light from behind the center head casts long, intimidating shadows.
- **Motion Prompt:** Subtle swaying of the serpent necks; the warrior's cape flutters in a heavy wind.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Cinematic wide shot, lone hooded warrior on a high jagged rock, surrounded by four massive serpent heads, golden amber mist, high contrast silhouette, epic fantasy style.
- **Negative Constraints:** No bright colors, no modern technology, no facial features visible on the warrior.

**CUT 02**
- **Time:** 00:02-00:04
- **Start Frame:** Close-up on the serpent head to the far left, jaw closed.
- **End Frame:** The serpent head lunges toward the camera, jaw unhinging to reveal rows of needle-like teeth.
- **Camera Work:** Tight Medium Shot, fast tracking movement following the head’s lunge.
- **Scene / Action Description:** One of the monsters breaks the silence, snapping its jaws aggressively at the warrior.
- **Motion Prompt:** Aggressive lunging motion, serpent head snapping forward with saliva droplets flying in the amber light.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Close up of a monstrous serpent head, mouth wide open, sharp teeth, textured scales, dark silhouette against golden mist.
- **Negative Constraints:** No cartoonish features, no blood, no changing the serpent's design.

**CUT 03**
- **Time:** 00:04-00:06
- **Start Frame:** Low angle shot looking up at the warrior from behind their boots.
- **End Frame:** The warrior shifts their weight, grounding their stance as the other three heads begin to hiss.
- **Camera Work:** Extreme Low Angle, static but with high tension.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The warrior remains calm despite the overwhelming size of the predators closing in.
- **Motion Prompt:** Warrior shifting weight, dust and small pebbles vibrating on the rock surface.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Low angle view of a hooded warrior’s boots on jagged rock, massive serpent necks looming in the background, cinematic lighting.
- **Negative Constraints:** Do not show the warrior's face, keep the lighting dark.

**CUT 04**
- **Time:** 00:06-00:08
- **Start Frame:** Medium shot of the warrior’s hand reaching for a hilt at their waist.
- **End Frame:** The hand grips the hilt; a faint amber spark ignites between the fingers.
- **Camera Work:** Medium Close-Up, shallow depth of field focusing on the hand.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The warrior prepares to counter-attack. The tension reaches a breaking point.
- **Motion Prompt:** Slow, deliberate hand movement, fingers tightening around the leather-wrapped hilt.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Close up of a warrior's gloved hand gripping a sword hilt, sparks of golden energy, dark cinematic fantasy style.
- **Negative Constraints:** No fast cuts, no blur, maintain the leather and metal textures.

**CUT 05**
- **Time:** 00:08-00:10
- **Start Frame:** The top-center serpent head descends from the clouds, looking directly down at the warrior.
- **End Frame:** The head lets out a visible sonic roar that ripples through the mist.
- **Camera Work:** High Angle looking down at the warrior, then tilting up to the serpent's face.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The "leader" head asserts dominance, screaming at the small human below.
- **Motion Prompt:** Vertical descent of the serpent head, mist swirling away from the force of the roar.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Massive serpent head looking down from a golden sky, mouth open in a roar, swirling mist, epic scale.
- **Negative Constraints:** No change in lighting color, keep the monochromatic amber/sepia palette.

**CUT 06**
- **Time:** 00:10-00:13
- **Start Frame:** Wide shot. All four heads lunge simultaneously toward the center point where the warrior stands.
- **End Frame:** The warrior draws the blade, and a blinding flash of golden light erupts from the center.
- **Camera Work:** Wide Shot, sudden zoom-in at the moment of the flash.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The climax of the sequence. The monsters strike, but the warrior unleashes a hidden power.
- **Motion Prompt:** Rapid convergence of the four serpent heads, followed by a radial explosion of light from the warrior.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** All four serpent heads lunging at a hooded warrior, a blinding golden light exploding from the warrior’s sword, cinematic impact frame.
- **Negative Constraints:** No lens flares that look digital, maintain the gritty texture of the mist.

**CUT 07**
- **Time:** 00:13-00:15
- **Start Frame:** Extreme wide shot of the mountain peak engulfed in a golden orb of energy.
- **End Frame:** The light fades into the mist, leaving only the silhouette of the warrior standing over the fallen, retreating shadows.
- **Camera Work:** Extreme Wide Shot, slow pull-back to reveal the scale of the mountain.
- **Scene / Action Description:** The aftermath of the strike. The warrior has repelled the beasts.
- **Motion Prompt:** Fading of the light, mist rolling back into the frame, silhouette remains motionless.
- **Single-Frame Keyframe Prompt:** Extreme wide shot of a lone mountain peak, golden mist clearing, dark silhouette of a warrior standing victorious, epic atmosphere.
- **Negative Constraints:** No debris falling in a way that breaks the scale, no change in the jagged rock shape.

[FULL STORYBOARD SHEET PROMPT]
**Purpose:** Generate a complete storyboard-sheet style board showing the entire 15-second sequence in vertical reading order with text support for each cut.
**Storyboard Sheet Prompt:** 
A professional cinematic storyboard sheet featuring 7 vertical panels. The style is dark epic fantasy with high-contrast silhouettes and golden-amber lighting. Panel 1: Wide shot of a warrior surrounded by four serpent heads. Panel 2: A head lunging close. Panel 3: Low angle of the warrior's stance. Panel 4: Hand gripping a glowing hilt. Panel 5: Top head roaring downward. Panel 6: All heads lunging as a golden explosion erupts. Panel 7: Distant wide shot of the warrior victorious in the mist. Each panel is labeled with "CUT" numbers and "TIME" stamps, accompanied by technical production text describing camera work and action, maintaining a gritty, realistic texture and consistent sepia-toned atmosphere throughout.

[CONSISTENCY ANCHORS]
- **Main Character Anchor:** Hooded silhouette, long flowing cape, no visible face.
- **Costume Anchor:** Heavy weathered cloak, leather gauntlets, grounded boots.
- **Prop Anchor:** Ancient sword with a hilt that glows with amber energy upon drawing.
- **Environment Anchor:** Jagged, dark rock pedestal surrounded by thick, glowing golden mist/fog.
- **Lighting / Color Anchor:** Monochromatic amber, sepia, and black; high-contrast rim lighting.
- **Do-Not-Drift Rules:** The number of serpent heads must remain four. The lighting must never shift to cool tones (blues/greens). The warrior must remain a silhouette.
examples.promptZh:
以下分镜表严格保留用户指定的视觉风格。

[项目概览]
- 时长：15 秒
- 风格锁定：黑暗电影感史诗奇幻，高对比剪影，棕褐与金琥珀色光照，雾气氛围，写实材质。
- 核心故事：一名孤独的兜帽战士站在嶙峋山巅，面对四头巨蛇般的庞然怪物，准备进行最后一次爆发式反击。
- 叙事流程：铺垫（包围）/ 发展（咆哮）/ 转折（拔剑）/ 回报（斩击）/ 结尾（光之爆炸）
- 镜头数：7
- 版式逻辑：自上而下阅读的竖向分镜表。

[竖向分镜表]
CUT 01：00:00-00:02，广角低机位，战士站在尖锐岩石上，四个沉睡的巨大蛇头以剪影围绕。镜头缓慢推进，金色雾气中蛇头开始轻微移动；斗篷在强风中翻动。关键帧：高耸岩石上的兜帽战士、四个巨蛇头、金琥珀雾、高对比剪影、史诗奇幻。限制：不要鲜艳色彩、不要现代科技、不要露出战士面部。
CUT 02：00:02-00:04，最左侧蛇头特写，从闭口到猛然扑向镜头，张开颌骨露出针状牙齿。快速跟随蛇头前冲，琥珀光中有唾液飞溅。限制：不要卡通化、不要血腥、不要改变蛇的设计。
CUT 03：00:04-00:06，从战士靴子后方仰拍。战士沉稳调整重心，其他三个蛇头开始嘶鸣，岩面碎石震动。限制：不要露出脸，保持暗调光线。
CUT 04：00:06-00:08，中近景浅景深，战士的手伸向腰间剑柄，手指握紧时琥珀色火花亮起。强调皮革、金属与缓慢蓄势。
CUT 05：00:08-00:10，顶部中央蛇头从云中垂下俯视战士，随后发出可见声波般的咆哮，雾气被震开。保持单色琥珀/棕褐调。
CUT 06：00:10-00:13，广角镜头，四个蛇头同时扑向战士所在中心；拔剑瞬间爆发耀眼金光。画面是冲击帧，怪物汇聚后被径向光爆吞没。
CUT 07：00:13-00:15，极远景，山峰被金色能量球吞没；光芒散入雾中，只留下战士胜利剪影与退散的阴影。不要破坏山岩尺度。

[完整分镜表提示词]
生成一张专业电影分镜表，包含 7 个竖向面板，呈现完整 15 秒序列。风格为黑暗史诗奇幻，高对比剪影与金琥珀照明。每格标注 CUT 编号和 TIME 时间戳，并配有摄影机运动、动作说明等制作文字。整体保持粗粝写实材质、棕褐色调与统一雾气氛围。

[一致性锚点]
主角：兜帽剪影、长披风、不可见面部。服装：厚重旧斗篷、皮革护手、稳固靴子。道具：古剑，拔出时剑柄发出琥珀能量。环境：黑色嶙峋岩台与浓厚发光金雾。光色：琥珀、棕褐、黑色，高对比轮廓光。禁止漂移：蛇头数量必须始终为四个；光线不可转为冷色；战士始终保持剪影。

examples.titleZh: A silver-haired demon hunter in a crimson coat battles a massive Hell Knight and
examples.titleEn: A silver-haired demon hunter in a crimson coat battles a massive Hell Knight and
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
The following gameplay sequence strictly preserves the user's specified visual style.

[GAMEPLAY OVERVIEW]
- Duration: 15 seconds
- Visual Style Lock: Devil May Cry (DMC) Series Style (High-fidelity stylized realism, gothic-modern fusion, high-contrast lighting, sharp particle effects, and leather/metallic textures).
- Presentation Mode: Real gameplay screen capture
- Core Scenario: A silver-haired demon hunter in a crimson coat battles a massive Hell Knight and a swarm of lesser demons in a ruined gothic cathedral.
- Camera Logic: Dynamic 3rd-person action camera; pulls back during crowd control, tightens and follows the arc during air combos, and locks onto the boss with a low-angle perspective.
- HUD Style: Stylized "Stylish Rank" meter on the top right, ornate health/Devil Trigger bars on the top left, and a boss health bar at the bottom.
- Number of Scenes: 6

[GAMEPLAY SEQUENCE]

SCENE 01 | 00:00-00:02 | The Opening Stinger
- Gameplay Beat: Gap closer/Engagement.
- Start Frame: Player stands at the entrance of a cathedral; HUD shows Rank [D].
- End Frame: Player performs a forward-thrust dash (Stinger), sword tip trailing white energy, hitting a group of demons.
- Camera: Third-person follow, centered on player’s back.
- HUD / UI: Health bar full, Rank meter shows "D - DEADLY!" in bronze text.
- Player State: Mid-dash, motion blur on the crimson coat.
- Enemy / Boss State: Three "Lesser Scythe" demons recoiling from the impact.
- Action: Fast-forward movement with a longsword thrust.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. A silver-haired male protagonist in a red leather coat performing a "Stinger" dash attack with a massive claymore. White wind-tunnel particle effects surround the blade. Ornate HUD in the corners. Gothic cathedral background with shattered stained glass.
- Negative Constraints: Cinematic cutscene, no HUD, low-res textures, static pose.

SCENE 02 | 00:02-00:04 | High Time Launch
- Gameplay Beat: Launcher/Air transition.
- Start Frame: Player swings the sword upward.
- End Frame: Player and a demon are suspended in mid-air; Rank climbs to [C].
- Camera: Low angle looking up at the vaulted ceiling to emphasize height.
- HUD / UI: Style Rank shifts to "C - CARNAGE!" in silver.
- Player State: Jumping, one hand on the sword hilt, red coat billowing downward.
- Enemy / Boss State: Demon is juggled in the air, hit-sparks flying from its chest.
- Action: Upward vertical slash launching the enemy.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. Player character performing an upward vertical sword slash, launching a demon into the air. Mid-air combat, glowing blue hit-sparks. HUD shows "C" rank. High-fidelity textures on leather and metal.
- Negative Constraints: Grounded combat, no particles, blurry characters.

SCENE 03 | 00:04-00:07 | Rainstorm Gunplay
- Gameplay Beat: Mid-air projectile stalling.
- Start Frame: Player spins upside down in the air.
- End Frame: A circle of bullets creates a localized "rain" effect on enemies below; Rank hits [A].
- Camera: Tracking the player's spin, close-in mid-air shot.
- HUD / UI: "A - ATOMIC!" in gold. Bullet count UI flickering.
- Player State: Upside down, dual pistols (black and silver) firing rapidly.
- Enemy / Boss State: Enemies below are staggered by a barrage of vertical bullets.
- Action: Rapid-fire mid-air gun technique.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. Character spinning upside down in mid-air, firing two handguns downward. Muzzle flashes are bright and sharp. Tracers fill the air. Gold "A" Style Rank UI in the top right. Dramatic lighting from cathedral windows.
- Negative Constraints: Slow motion, lack of UI, realistic muzzle flashes (should be stylized).

SCENE 04 | 00:07-00:10 | Devil Trigger Activation
- Gameplay Beat: Power-up/Super state.
- Start Frame: Player lands; a purple shockwave erupts.
- End Frame: Player glows with a demonic aura; HUD glows neon purple; Rank hits [S].
- Camera: Slightly shakes; pulls back to show the shockwave radius.
- HUD / UI: Devil Trigger bar (purple) flashing; Rank "S - SMOKIN'!" in glowing red.
- Player State: Standing in a power pose, wreathed in purple electricity/smoke.
- Enemy / Boss State: Small demons knocked back by the transformation burst.
- Action: Character transformation activation.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. Character activating Devil Trigger mode. Intense purple aura and lightning effects. Screen has a slight chromatic aberration at the edges. Ornate purple UI bars filling up. Red "S" rank visible.
- Negative Constraints: Human-only form, no aura, quiet lighting.

SCENE 05 | 00:10-00:13 | Boss Encounter: The Hell Knight
- Gameplay Beat: Boss combat/Evasion.
- Start Frame: A massive armored demon knight swings a giant mace.
- End Frame: Player dodges with a "Trickster" dash, leaving a trail of afterimages.
- Camera: Side-view "Fighting Game" style wide shot to show scale.
- HUD / UI: Large health bar at the bottom: "HELL KNIGHT CAVALIERE." Style Rank: [SS].
- Player State: Mid-sidestep dodge, blur effect.
- Enemy / Boss State: Massive boss mid-swing, glowing red eyes, heavy armor.
- Action: Precision dodge against a boss-scale attack.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. Large scale boss fight against a 15-foot tall demonic knight. Player character dodging a massive mace. Boss health bar at the bottom. After-image effect on the player. "SS - SMOKIN' STYLE!" rank in the corner.
- Negative Constraints: Small enemies, top-down view, simple lighting.

SCENE 06 | 00:13-00:15 | SSS Finisher
- Gameplay Beat: Finishing Move/Combo End.
- Start Frame: Player charges a massive overhead sword strike.
- End Frame: Impact frame with white/red flash; Rank hits [SSS].
- Camera: Tight close-up on the impact, slightly tilted (Dutch angle).
- HUD / UI: "SSS - SMOKIN' SEXY STYLE!!" pulsating in the center-right.
- Player State: Finished swing, sword buried in the ground/boss.
- Enemy / Boss State: Boss shattering into black crystalline shards.
- Action: Final blow of a long combo.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture, DMC style. Final blow impact. High-contrast red and white impact frames. Demon boss dissolving into embers and shards. Neon "SSS" Rank HUD fills the right side of the screen. Stylish victory pose mid-action.
- Negative Constraints: Weak impact, no HUD, low contrast.

[GLOBAL HUD PACKAGE]
- Player HUD: Ornate health bar (Green) and Devil Trigger runes (Purple) in the top left.
- Enemy / Boss HUD: Name and long health bar at the bottom center (Dark Gothic font).
- Minimap / Navigation: Small circular ornate compass in bottom left (rarely used, kept minimal).
- Skill / Item Bar: Weapon icons (Sword/Gun) in the bottom right corner.
- Targeting / Lock-On: Red concentric circle with a diamond center on the current target.
- Objective Text: "Exterminate the Demon Presence" in small white text top center.
- On-Screen Prompt Style: PS5/Xbox styled button prompts for "Interactions" in a sharp, metallic font.

[CONSISTENCY ANCHORS]
- Main Character Anchor: Silver hair, floor-length red leather coat with belts/buckles, black trousers.
- Weapon / Gear Anchor: Massive oversized broadsword with a skull crossguard; dual pistols (one ivory, one ebony).
- Enemy / Boss Anchor: Bony, insectoid-demons and armored obsidian knights with glowing red cores.
- Environment Anchor: Ruined gothic cathedral, blue moonlight through shattered windows, marble floor debris.
- Lighting / FX Anchor: Heavy bloom, sharp particle trails (blue/purple/red), high-contrast shadows.
- UI Anchor: The "Stylish" Rank meter must be the most prominent UI element.
- Do-Not-Drift Rules: No soft "painterly" looks; keep the "hard" metallic and leather textures of DMC5. No cinematic bars.

[MASTER GAMEPLAY IMAGE PROMPT]
Create a high-impact gameplay frame that looks like an actual in-game screen capture from a Devil May Cry style action game, not concept art or a poster. Preserve the high-contrast gothic-modern aesthetic, maintain a silver-haired hunter in a red leather coat using a massive sword. Use readable combat staging with the character mid-air jugging a demon, believable gameplay camera logic, and a cohesive HUD featuring a "Stylish Rank" meter in the top right corner and health bars in the top left. Lighting must be dramatic with sharp particle effects and high-fidelity textures.
examples.promptZh:
以下游戏画面序列严格保留用户指定的视觉风格。

[玩法概览]
- 时长：15 秒
- 视觉风格锁定：Devil May Cry 系列风格，高保真风格化写实、哥特与现代融合、高对比光照、锐利粒子特效、皮革与金属材质。
- 呈现模式：真实游戏实机截图。
- 核心场景：银发恶魔猎人穿深红皮革长外套，在废墟哥特教堂中与巨大的 Hell Knight 和一群低阶恶魔战斗。
- 镜头逻辑：动态第三人称动作镜头；群体控制时拉远，空中连段时收紧并跟随攻击弧线，面对 Boss 时低机位锁定。
- HUD：右上角醒目的 Stylish Rank 评分，左上角华丽生命/Devil Trigger 条，底部 Boss 血条。
- 场景数：6

[玩法序列]
SCENE 01 开场突刺：玩家站在教堂入口，HUD 显示 D 级；随后向前突刺冲刺，巨剑拖出白色能量击中恶魔群。第三人称背后跟随，红皮衣有运动模糊，角落有华丽 HUD。避免电影过场、无 HUD、低清材质或静态姿势。
SCENE 02 High Time 浮空：玩家向上挥剑，把恶魔挑到空中，评分升至 C。低机位仰拍穹顶，蓝色打击火花，皮革和金属质感高保真。
SCENE 03 Rainstorm 枪击：玩家倒悬在空中旋转，用黑白双枪向下连射，子弹形成雨幕，评分到 A。金色 A 级 UI、明亮枪口火光与教堂窗户戏剧光。
SCENE 04 Devil Trigger 激活：落地后紫色冲击波爆发，角色被恶魔气场包围，HUD 变为霓虹紫，评分到 S。画面边缘轻微色差，紫色电光与烟雾强烈。
SCENE 05 Boss 战 Hell Knight：15 英尺高的装甲恶魔骑士挥动巨锤，玩家用 Trickster 闪避留下残影。宽幅横向格斗视角，底部显示 “HELL KNIGHT CAVALIERE” Boss 血条，角落显示 SS。
SCENE 06 SSS 终结：玩家蓄力下劈，红白高对比冲击帧，Boss 化为黑色晶体碎片，右侧 SSS 评分大幅跳动。要强冲击、强 HUD、高对比。

[全局 HUD 包]
玩家 HUD：左上绿色生命条与紫色 Devil Trigger 符文。敌人/Boss：底部中央深哥特字体名称与长血条。导航：左下小型华丽圆形罗盘。技能/物品：右下武器图标（剑/枪）。锁定：红色同心圆与菱形中心。目标文字：顶部小白字 “Exterminate the Demon Presence”。按钮提示：PS5/Xbox 风格金属字体。

[一致性锚点]
主角：银发、及地红皮革外套、皮带扣、黑裤。武器：骷髅护手超大阔剑、黑白双枪。敌人：骨质昆虫恶魔与黑曜石装甲骑士，红色核心发光。环境：破败哥特教堂、碎彩窗中的蓝月光、大理石地面碎片。特效：强 bloom、蓝/紫/红锐利粒子轨迹、高对比阴影。UI：Stylish Rank 必须最醒目。禁止柔和绘画感、禁止电影黑边。主图应像 DMC 风格动作游戏的真实截图，而不是概念图或海报。

examples.titleZh: Ashes of the Ancient: Dragonspine Duel
examples.titleEn: Ashes of the Ancient: Dragonspine Duel
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
The following storyboard board strictly preserves the user's specified visual style.

[BOARD HEADER]
Title: Ashes of the Ancient: Dragonspine Duel
Project: Ashes of the Ancient
Format: 16:9
Sequence: 01 / 01
Duration: 15 seconds
Style Lock: High-fidelity fantasy CGI, realistic textures, dark cinematic lighting, glowing purple magical accents.

[SCENE CARDS]

SCENE 01 | 00:00-00:02 | THE ANCIENT AWAKENS
Start Frame:
A low-angle shot behind the Dark Elf warrior. She stands tiny before the massive Ancient Fire Drake. The dragon's throat glows with building embers.

End Frame:
The Drake let's out a deafening roar, its massive wings unfurling to block out the sunset. Dust and pebbles vibrate on the ground.

Camera:
Low-angle tracking shot, slowly pushing toward the dragon.

Dialogue:
None

SFX:
Low-frequency rumble, leather-like creak of wings, sudden bass-heavy dragon roar.

Action:
The Dark Elf grips her daggers; the dragon asserts its dominance by expanding its physical presence.

Start Frame Image Prompt:
High-fidelity fantasy CGI, low angle, dark elf female warrior with long white hair in ornate black and purple armor, standing in front of a massive black fire drake, dragon throat glowing orange, ruined stone pillars, cinematic lighting, 16:9.

End Frame Image Prompt:
High-fidelity fantasy CGI, massive dragon wings spreading wide, black scales reflecting orange sunset, dragon head roaring, dark elf warrior in foreground, embers flying, cinematic depth of field, 16:9.

Negative Constraints:
Cartoonish style, low detail, bright daylight, flat lighting.

SCENE 02 | 00:02-00:05 | THE INFERNO BREATH
Start Frame:
The Drake snaps its head forward. A concentrated beam of orange fire begins to erupt from its maw.

End Frame:
The fire consumes the foreground. The Dark Elf is seen in silhouette, leaping laterally to the left, leaving a purple magical trail.

Camera:
Extreme wide shot to show the scale of the fire breath, then a quick pan to follow the elf's movement.

Dialogue:
None

SFX:
Jet-engine roar of fire, crackling heat.

Action:
The dragon breathes a torrent of flame; the elf uses a high-speed dash to avoid the blast.

High-fidelity fantasy CGI, fire drake breathing a massive torrent of orange fire, intense heat distortion, dark environment, ruins illuminated by fire, 16:9.

End Frame Image Prompt:

Negative Constraints:
Static movement, blue fire, change in armor design.

SCENE 03 | 00:05-00:08 | SHADOW STEP
Start Frame:
The Dark Elf vanishes into a cloud of purple smoke mid-air as the dragon's head turns to follow her.

End Frame:
The Elf reappears directly above the dragon’s neck, her twin daggers glowing with intense violet light.

Camera:

None

examples.promptZh:
以下分镜板严格保留用户指定的视觉风格。

[板头]
标题：远古余烬：龙脊决斗。项目：Ashes of the Ancient。格式：16:9。序列：01/01。时长：15 秒。风格锁定：高保真奇幻 CGI、写实材质、黑暗电影光照、发光紫色魔法点缀。

[场景卡]
SCENE 01 远古苏醒：从黑暗精灵战士背后低机位拍摄，她在巨大的远古火龙前显得极小，龙喉中有余烬聚集。结尾龙展开巨翼遮住夕阳并发出震耳咆哮，地面尘土与碎石震动。画面关键词：长白发黑暗精灵、黑紫装甲、巨型黑色火龙、橙色喉光、废墟石柱、电影光。
SCENE 02 炼狱吐息：火龙猛地探头，橙色火焰束从口中喷出并吞没前景。黑暗精灵以剪影向左侧高速闪避，留下紫色魔法轨迹。镜头用极远景展示火焰规模，再快速摇移跟随精灵动作。
SCENE 03 紫刃反击：精灵从火焰边缘翻滚而出，双匕首蓄起紫色能量，随后冲向龙爪与鳞片间的薄弱点。镜头切为中近景和运动跟拍，强调匕首轨迹、火星、鳞片质感。
SCENE 04 龙爪压制：火龙巨爪砸向地面，石板碎裂，精灵从爪间翻身闪过。使用低角度广角，体现体型差距、冲击尘雾和紫色残影。
SCENE 05 跃向龙首：黑暗精灵沿断裂石柱跳跃升高，朝龙头发起空中突袭。镜头仰拍，背景是燃烧天空、巨翼和飞散余烬。
SCENE 06 魔法爆发：匕首刺入龙鳞裂隙，紫色魔法能量爆开，与橙色龙火形成强烈色彩对撞。镜头紧贴冲击点，强调能量裂纹、火花与鳞片碎屑。
SCENE 07 余烬之后：远景显示龙在废墟中退缩或倒下，黑暗精灵站在烟雾与紫色余辉中。镜头慢慢拉远，留下史诗决斗后的寂静。

[角色、音效与方向]
主角为白发黑暗精灵女战士，黑紫装甲、双匕首、敏捷而冷静。敌人为巨型远古火龙，黑鳞、橙色喉光、巨大双翼。整体音效包含低频龙吼、火焰喷射、石块崩裂、魔法嗡鸣与匕首划破空气。保持 16:9、电影景深、高保真 CGI，不要卡通、低细节、明亮日光或平面光。

examples.titleZh: A high-stakes shootout in a dusty frontier town leading to a mounted escape
examples.titleEn: A high-stakes shootout in a dusty frontier town leading to a mounted escape
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
The following gameplay sequence strictly preserves the user's specified visual style.

[GAMEPLAY OVERVIEW]
- Duration: 15 seconds
- Visual Style Lock: Red Dead Redemption (Gritty Western realism, high-contrast sunlit environments, film-grain textures, detailed leather and wood assets, warm golden-hour lighting).
- Presentation Mode: Real gameplay screen capture
- Core Scenario: A high-stakes shootout in a dusty frontier town leading to a mounted escape.
- Camera Logic: Third-person over-the-shoulder with dynamic combat tracking and a brief "Dead Eye" time-slow transition.
- HUD Style: Classic Western minimalist (Circular minimap, central bottom attribute cores, top-right weapon/ammo status).
- Number of Scenes: 5

[GAMEPLAY SEQUENCE]

SCENE 01 | 00:00-00:02 | The Standoff
- Gameplay Beat: Player character faces three outlaws in the center of a dusty main street.
- Start Frame: Character's hand hovering over the holster, enemies at mid-distance.
- End Frame: The "Draw" prompt appears on the screen.
- Camera: Low-angle third-person, looking over the player's shoulder toward the outlaws.
- HUD / UI: Circular minimap (bottom-left) showing red enemy dots; Health/Stamina/Dead Eye cores (bottom-center) are full.
- Player State: Idle, hand twitching near the revolver.
- Enemy / Boss State: Three hostile NPCs in aggressive stances, hands on belts.
- Action: Tension-building zoom as heat haze ripples off the ground.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Screen capture of a third-person Western game, a cowboy standing in a dusty town street facing outlaws, "R2 DRAW" button prompt on screen, circular minimap in bottom left corner, realistic lighting, grit and dust textures.
- Negative Constraints: No health bars over heads, no flashy magic, no modern UI.

SCENE 02 | 00:02-00:05 | Dead Eye Activation
- Gameplay Beat: Time slows down as the screen tints sepia; player marks targets.
- Start Frame: Screen turns warm/orange; "X" marks appear on the heads and chests of enemies.
- End Frame: Marks are set, time is about to resume.
- Camera: Tight over-the-shoulder, slightly canted for intensity.
- HUD / UI: Dead Eye meter (eye icon) draining rapidly in the center-bottom.
- Player State: Aiming a Cattleman Revolver.
- Enemy / Boss State: Frozen in mid-draw animation.
- Action: Red "X" target markers fixed on the enemies' vital points.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture of a Western shooter in slow-motion "Dead Eye" mode, sepia-toned filter, red X markers on enemy targets, player character aiming a revolver, attribute cores at bottom center.
- Negative Constraints: No cinematic cutscene bars, no menu screens.

SCENE 03 | 00:05-00:08 | Cover Fire
- Gameplay Beat: Player dives behind a wooden crate as bullets splinter the wood.
- Start Frame: Player hitting the ground behind cover.
- End Frame: Player leaning out to return fire; smoke rising from the gun barrel.
- Camera: Close-in cover camera, low to the ground.
- HUD / UI: Ammo counter (top-right) shows 3/18 bullets remaining.
- Player State: Crouched behind a crate, hat slightly askew.
- Enemy / Boss State: One enemy falling back, two others taking cover behind a hitching post.
- Action: Impact sparks and wood splinters flying from the crate; muzzle flashes visible.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Third-person gameplay capture, cowboy character in cover behind a wooden crate, wood splinters flying from bullet impacts, dusty atmosphere, HUD showing ammo count in top right and minimap in bottom left.
- Negative Constraints: No floating damage numbers, no health bars.

SCENE 04 | 00:08-00:11 | Breaking for the Horse
- Gameplay Beat: Player sprints toward a hitched horse while firing a final shot.
- Start Frame: Player standing up and sprinting toward a white Arabian horse.
- End Frame: Player reaching the horse; "Y MOUNT" prompt appears.
- Camera: Pursuit camera, shaking slightly to simulate running.
- HUD / UI: "Wanted" meter in red text appearing in the top-right corner.
- Player State: Sprinting, stamina core pulsing.
- Enemy / Boss State: Lawmen appearing at the end of the street.
- Action: Motion blur on the environment as the player runs.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay capture of a cowboy sprinting through a dusty town toward a horse, "Y Mount" prompt hovering over the horse, red "WANTED" text in top right, third-person perspective, realistic motion blur.
- Negative Constraints: No teleporting, no static camera.

SCENE 05 | 00:11-00:15 | The Great Escape
- Gameplay Beat: Galloping out of town into the desert as bullets whiz by.
- Start Frame: Player swinging onto the saddle.
- End Frame: Horse galloping toward a canyon; town disappearing in the dust cloud behind.
- Camera: Wide third-person follow camera behind the horse.
- HUD / UI: Stamina lightning bolt icon appearing over the horse's haunches; "EVADE THE LAW" objective text.
- Player State: Mounted, looking back over the shoulder while riding.
- Enemy / Boss State: Distant silhouettes of riders giving chase.
- Action: Heavy dust trails behind the horse; hooves kicking up dirt.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Third-person gameplay screen capture, cowboy on a galloping horse fleeing a desert town, sunset lighting, dust trail behind horse, horse stamina meter on screen, "EVADE THE LAW" objective text at bottom.
- Negative Constraints: No map screen, no inventory open.

[GLOBAL HUD PACKAGE]
- Player HUD: Circular minimap (bottom-left), Health/Stamina/Dead Eye cores (white icons, center-bottom).
- Enemy / Boss HUD: Red dots on minimap; no overhead health bars.
- Minimap / Navigation: Detailed parchment-style circular map with a gold player arrow.
- Skill / Item Bar: Weapon wheel hidden; active weapon (Revolver) and ammo count shown top-right.
- Targeting / Lock-On: Subtle white dot reticle; red X marks during Dead Eye.
- Objective Text: Simple white sans-serif text (e.g., "Escape the Law") at the bottom center.
- On-Screen Prompt Style: Small white button icons (A/X/Y/B or R2/L2) with action text.

[CONSISTENCY ANCHORS]
- Main Character Anchor: Weathered leather duster coat, tan Stetson hat, dual bandoliers, rugged facial hair.
- Weapon / Gear Anchor: Cattleman Revolver with wood grips; worn leather holster.
- Enemy / Boss Anchor: Period-accurate outlaws in vests and hats; lawmen in tin stars and dark coats.
- Environment Anchor: Arid desert town, sun-bleached wood, hitching posts, tumbleweeds, and deep orange sand.
- Lighting / FX Anchor: Volumetric god-rays, heavy sun-glare, realistic smoke and dust particles.
- UI Anchor: Transparent backgrounds for icons, high-contrast white text, period-appropriate iconography.
- Do-Not-Drift Rules: Keep the lighting grounded in 1890s realism; no "gamey" glowing outlines or neon elements; maintain the dusty film-grain overlay throughout.

[MASTER GAMEPLAY IMAGE PROMPT]
Create a high-impact gameplay frame that looks like an actual in-game screen capture, not concept art or a poster. Preserve the user's exact visual style, maintain consistent character and world design, use readable combat staging, believable gameplay camera logic, and a cohesive HUD/UI system appropriate to the setting.
examples.promptZh:
以下游戏画面序列严格保留用户指定的视觉风格。

[玩法概览]
时长 15 秒。视觉风格锁定为 Red Dead Redemption 式粗粝西部写实：高对比日照、胶片颗粒、精细皮革与木质资产、温暖黄金时刻光线。呈现模式为真实游戏截图。核心场景是一场尘土飞扬的边境小镇枪战，最后骑马逃离。镜头为第三人称越肩动态战斗跟随，并包含短暂 “Dead Eye” 慢动作转场。HUD 使用经典西部极简风格：左下圆形小地图、底部中心生命/体力/Dead Eye 核心、右上武器与弹药状态。

[玩法序列]
SCENE 01 对峙：牛仔在小镇主街面对三名歹徒，手悬在枪套上，屏幕出现 “R2 DRAW” 提示。左下小地图显示红点，核心状态满格。低角度第三人称越肩镜头，热浪从地面升起。不要现代 UI、血条或魔法。
SCENE 02 Dead Eye 激活：画面变为棕褐暖色，时间放慢，敌人头部和胸口出现红色 X 标记。玩家举起 Cattleman Revolver，Dead Eye 计量条快速下降。不要过场黑边或菜单画面。
SCENE 03 掩体射击：玩家扑到木箱后方，子弹击碎木板，随后探身还击，枪口烟雾升起。右上弹药显示 3/18，左下小地图可见。不要漂浮伤害数字或头顶血条。
SCENE 04 冲向马匹：玩家起身奔向拴着的白色阿拉伯马，同时开最后一枪。马旁出现 “Y MOUNT” 提示，右上出现红色 Wanted 通缉文字，体力核心跳动。
SCENE 05 大逃亡：玩家翻身上马，迎着子弹冲出小镇奔向峡谷，身后尘云吞没街道。HUD 显示马匹体力图标与 “EVADE THE LAW” 目标文字，远处骑手剪影追赶。

[全局 HUD 包]
玩家 HUD：左下圆形羊皮纸风小地图，底部中心生命/体力/Dead Eye 白色图标核心。敌人：小地图红点，无头顶血条。武器：右上 Revolver 与弹药计数。瞄准：细白点准星，Dead Eye 中有红色 X。目标文字：底部中心简洁白色无衬线。按钮提示：小型白色 A/X/Y/B 或 R2/L2 图标。

[一致性锚点]
主角穿旧皮革防尘大衣、棕色 Stetson 帽、双弹带、粗犷胡茬；武器为木柄 Cattleman Revolver 和磨旧皮枪套。敌人为时代准确的歹徒与警长。环境是干旱沙漠小镇、晒白木板、拴马柱、风滚草和橙色沙地。保持 1890 年代写实感、尘土、烟雾、体积光与胶片颗粒；不要霓虹轮廓或过度游戏化发光。
promptsOriginal:
The following gameplay sequence strictly preserves the user's specified visual style.

[GAMEPLAY OVERVIEW]
- Duration: 15 seconds
- Visual Style Lock: Red Dead Redemption (Gritty Western realism, high-contrast sunlit environments, film-grain textures, detailed leather and wood assets, warm golden-hour lighting).
- Presentation Mode: Real gameplay screen capture
- Core Scenario: A high-stakes shootout in a dusty frontier town leading to a mounted escape.
- Camera Logic: Third-person over-the-shoulder with dynamic combat tracking and a brief "Dead Eye" time-slow transition.
- HUD Style: Classic Western minimalist (Circular minimap, central bottom attribute cores, top-right weapon/ammo status).
- Number of Scenes: 5

[GAMEPLAY SEQUENCE]

SCENE 01 | 00:00-00:02 | The Standoff
- Gameplay Beat: Player character faces three outlaws in the center of a dusty main street.
- Start Frame: Character's hand hovering over the holster, enemies at mid-distance.
- End Frame: The "Draw" prompt appears on the screen.
- Camera: Low-angle third-person, looking over the player's shoulder toward the outlaws.
- HUD / UI: Circular minimap (bottom-left) showing red enemy dots; Health/Stamina/Dead Eye cores (bottom-center) are full.
- Player State: Idle, hand twitching near the revolver.
- Enemy / Boss State: Three hostile NPCs in aggressive stances, hands on belts.
- Action: Tension-building zoom as heat haze ripples off the ground.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Screen capture of a third-person Western game, a cowboy standing in a dusty town street facing outlaws, "R2 DRAW" button prompt on screen, circular minimap in bottom left corner, realistic lighting, grit and dust textures.
- Negative Constraints: No health bars over heads, no flashy magic, no modern UI.

SCENE 02 | 00:02-00:05 | Dead Eye Activation
- Gameplay Beat: Time slows down as the screen tints sepia; player marks targets.
- Start Frame: Screen turns warm/orange; "X" marks appear on the heads and chests of enemies.
- End Frame: Marks are set, time is about to resume.
- Camera: Tight over-the-shoulder, slightly canted for intensity.
- HUD / UI: Dead Eye meter (eye icon) draining rapidly in the center-bottom.
- Player State: Aiming a Cattleman Revolver.
- Enemy / Boss State: Frozen in mid-draw animation.
- Action: Red "X" target markers fixed on the enemies' vital points.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay screen capture of a Western shooter in slow-motion "Dead Eye" mode, sepia-toned filter, red X markers on enemy targets, player character aiming a revolver, attribute cores at bottom center.
- Negative Constraints: No cinematic cutscene bars, no menu screens.

SCENE 03 | 00:05-00:08 | Cover Fire
- Gameplay Beat: Player dives behind a wooden crate as bullets splinter the wood.
- Start Frame: Player hitting the ground behind cover.
- End Frame: Player leaning out to return fire; smoke rising from the gun barrel.
- Camera: Close-in cover camera, low to the ground.
- HUD / UI: Ammo counter (top-right) shows 3/18 bullets remaining.
- Player State: Crouched behind a crate, hat slightly askew.
- Enemy / Boss State: One enemy falling back, two others taking cover behind a hitching post.
- Action: Impact sparks and wood splinters flying from the crate; muzzle flashes visible.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Third-person gameplay capture, cowboy character in cover behind a wooden crate, wood splinters flying from bullet impacts, dusty atmosphere, HUD showing ammo count in top right and minimap in bottom left.
- Negative Constraints: No floating damage numbers, no health bars.

SCENE 04 | 00:08-00:11 | Breaking for the Horse
- Gameplay Beat: Player sprints toward a hitched horse while firing a final shot.
- Start Frame: Player standing up and sprinting toward a white Arabian horse.
- End Frame: Player reaching the horse; "Y MOUNT" prompt appears.
- Camera: Pursuit camera, shaking slightly to simulate running.
- HUD / UI: "Wanted" meter in red text appearing in the top-right corner.
- Player State: Sprinting, stamina core pulsing.
- Enemy / Boss State: Lawmen appearing at the end of the street.
- Action: Motion blur on the environment as the player runs.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Gameplay capture of a cowboy sprinting through a dusty town toward a horse, "Y Mount" prompt hovering over the horse, red "WANTED" text in top right, third-person perspective, realistic motion blur.
- Negative Constraints: No teleporting, no static camera.

SCENE 05 | 00:11-00:15 | The Great Escape
- Gameplay Beat: Galloping out of town into the desert as bullets whiz by.
- Start Frame: Player swinging onto the saddle.
- End Frame: Horse galloping toward a canyon; town disappearing in the dust cloud behind.
- Camera: Wide third-person follow camera behind the horse.
- HUD / UI: Stamina lightning bolt icon appearing over the horse's haunches; "EVADE THE LAW" objective text.
- Player State: Mounted, looking back over the shoulder while riding.
- Enemy / Boss State: Distant silhouettes of riders giving chase.
- Action: Heavy dust trails behind the horse; hooves kicking up dirt.
- Single-Frame Gameplay Prompt: Third-person gameplay screen capture, cowboy on a galloping horse fleeing a desert town, sunset lighting, dust trail behind horse, horse stamina meter on screen, "EVADE THE LAW" objective text at bottom.
- Negative Constraints: No map screen, no inventory open.

[GLOBAL HUD PACKAGE]
- Player HUD: Circular minimap (bottom-left), Health/Stamina/Dead Eye cores (white icons, center-bottom).
- Enemy / Boss HUD: Red dots on minimap; no overhead health bars.
- Minimap / Navigation: Detailed parchment-style circular map with a gold player arrow.
- Skill / Item Bar: Weapon wheel hidden; active weapon (Revolver) and ammo count shown top-right.
- Targeting / Lock-On: Subtle white dot reticle; red X marks during Dead Eye.
- Objective Text: Simple white sans-serif text (e.g., "Escape the Law") at the bottom center.
- On-Screen Prompt Style: Small white button icons (A/X/Y/B or R2/L2) with action text.

[CONSISTENCY ANCHORS]
- Main Character Anchor: Weathered leather duster coat, tan Stetson hat, dual bandoliers, rugged facial hair.
- Weapon / Gear Anchor: Cattleman Revolver with wood grips; worn leather holster.
- Enemy / Boss Anchor: Period-accurate outlaws in vests and hats; lawmen in tin stars and dark coats.
- Environment Anchor: Arid desert town, sun-bleached wood, hitching posts, tumbleweeds, and deep orange sand.
- Lighting / FX Anchor: Volumetric god-rays, heavy sun-glare, realistic smoke and dust particles.
- UI Anchor: Transparent backgrounds for icons, high-contrast white text, period-appropriate iconography.
- Do-Not-Drift Rules: Keep the lighting grounded in 1890s realism; no "gamey" glowing outlines or neon elements; maintain the dusty film-grain overlay throughout.

[MASTER GAMEPLAY IMAGE PROMPT]
Create a high-impact gameplay frame that looks like an actual in-game screen capture, not concept art or a poster. Preserve the user's exact visual style, maintain consistent character and world design, use readable combat staging, believable gameplay camera logic, and a cohesive HUD/UI system appropriate to the setting.

examples.titleZh: High-end fashion editorial photography with a cinematic, urban-organic aesthetic
examples.titleEn: High-end fashion editorial photography with a cinematic, urban-organic aesthetic
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
Style & Lighting:
High-end fashion editorial photography with a cinematic, urban-organic aesthetic. The image features soft, natural daylight on a bright but slightly hazy day. The technical highlight is a dramatic long-exposure motion blur effect, where pedestrians walking past the subjects appear as ghostly, blurred streaks, while the central models remain in sharp, static focus. It carries an authentic 35mm film grain and a fine analog noise texture, giving it a high-fashion magazine finish from the early 2000s.
Subjects & Pose:
Two models—a young woman and a young Black man—pose confidently and motionless in the middle of a city crosswalk. They are standing close together, looking directly at the camera with neutral, cool expressions. Their static presence creates a powerful contrast against the rushing movement of the city around them.
Fashion & Clothing:
They are dressed in eclectic, high-texture street fashion:
Female Model: Wears a chunky, sleeveless patchwork knit vest with bold blocks of red, yellow, and white. She pairs it with a short white utility mini skirt, a light grey beanie with subtle cat-ear-like points, and heavy brown-and-yellow lace-up hiking boots. She carries a small patterned bag tucked under her arm.
Male Model: Wears an oversized, multi-textured patchwork knit sweater in shades of beige, brown, yellow, and muted pink. He is styled with a brown beanie, khaki cargo pants with dangling strap details, a black belt bag (fanny pack), and beige-and-grey lace-up hiking boots.
Setting & Composition:
The scene is set in a bustling urban canyon, likely New York City, with towering concrete skyscrapers and city architecture filling the background. They are standing on the white stripes of a zebra-style crosswalk. The perspective is a full-body shot that captures the scale of the city and the unique silhouettes of the clothing.
examples.promptZh: 风格与光线：高端时尚编辑摄影，具有电影感的都市-自然混合美学。明亮但微雾的自然日光，柔和、略去饱和的色调。技术亮点是戏剧性的长曝光运动模糊：行人或背景形成流动拖影，而主体保持清晰。主体为时装模特，穿着层次丰富的造型，在城市街道或绿植环境中呈现从容姿态。构图强调动静对比、真实街拍氛围、35mm 胶片质感、细腻布料纹理和高级时尚杂志感。

examples.titleZh: High-fashion "night-out" street photography with a cinematic 35mm film aesthetic
examples.titleEn: High-fashion "night-out" street photography with a cinematic 35mm film aesthetic
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
Style & Lighting:
High-fashion "night-out" street photography with a cinematic 35mm film aesthetic. The image utilizes a sharp, direct on-camera flash that brightly illuminates the subject, creating high contrast against the dark urban background and casting realistic shadows. It features authentic film grain, fine noise texture, and saturated colors, mimicking the look of an underground fashion magazine or a paparazzi-style snapshot.
Subject & Pose:
A slender young Asian woman posing confidently on a city street at night. She is leaning her hip against a silver metal pedestrian guardrail, looking back over her shoulder with a captivating, slightly moody expression. Her pose is dynamic, with one leg extended to showcase her footwear and tights.
Fashion & Clothing:
She is wearing an edgy, Y2K-inspired outfit:
Top/Dress: A short, backless halter-neck mini dress featuring a bold geometric graphic print in shades of purple, lavender, and orange.
Legwear: Sheer fuchsia or magenta-toned tights that add a pop of vibrant color to her legs.
Footwear: High-shine, glossy black leather knee-high boots with sharp stiletto heels, creating a sleek and sophisticated silhouette.
Setting & Background:
The scene is set in a bustling, neon-lit urban environment, likely a street in Hong Kong. Behind her is a large multi-story red building. A prominent glowing digital billboard is visible with the text: "VALX We aim to be the most prominent evolutionary for humanity." The background is filled with blurred city elements, including glowing shop signs with Chinese characters, a red taxi, bright street lamps, and out-of-focus pedestrians.

examples.titleZh: A candid, high-contrast fashion portrait captured with a harsh, direct on-camera
examples.titleEn: A candid, high-contrast fashion portrait captured with a harsh, direct on-camera
examples.author: OpenArt import
examples.promptOriginal:
Style & Lighting:
A candid, high-contrast fashion portrait captured with a harsh, direct on-camera flash. The image features a heavy 35mm film grain and a high-noise floor, creating a gritty 90s lo-fi aesthetic. The flash creates bright highlights on the subject's face and the food, while casting deep, sharp shadows against the face and background.
Subject & Pose:
A tight close-up of a young woman’s face from the nose down. She is captured in a dynamic, playful moment, performing a dramatic "cheese pull" where long, gooey strings of melted white cheese stretch from her mouth to a golden-brown baked empanada or pastry she is holding. Her lips are pursed and tinted with a soft red hue.
Fashion & Accessories:
She is wearing small, trendy black rectangular cat-eye sunglasses. Her accessories include delicate gold hoop earrings, with a small gold star charm hanging from the lower hoop. Her fingernails are painted in a glossy, dark forest-green or black nail polish.
Setting & Details:
She holds the hot pastry wrapped in a piece of crumpled white parchment paper. The background is a solid, vibrant emerald-green wall, creating a bold color contrast with her skin and the golden food. The focus is sharp on the texture of the melted cheese and the flaky crust of the pastry.
examples.promptZh: 风格与光线：一张随性、高对比的时尚人像，使用刺眼的直射机顶闪光灯拍摄。画面带有厚重 35mm 胶片颗粒和高噪点，营造粗粝 90 年代低保真美学。闪光灯在主体皮肤和服装上形成明亮高光，背景更暗。主体为年轻时尚人物，姿态自然自信，服装和配饰具有复古编辑感。保持真实皮肤纹理、胶片噪点、闪光阴影和抓拍氛围。
